rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages As To Doe Defendant Edward Savino
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC., GILBERT "GIL" HODGES, EDWARD SAVINO Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages As To Doe Defendant Edward Savino GRANTED with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts in support of malice, oppression of fraud as to Mr. Savino. All amendments to be in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREMONT GOLD MINING, LLC. VS. A.J. LAND COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Declaratory Judgment Or In The Alternative For Leave To Serve By Alternate Means
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF FREMONT GOLD MINING, LLC. For Declaratory Judgment Or In The Alternative For Leave To Serve By Alternate Means DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the relief sought (which appears to be the sole relief sought by the Complaint) may be obtained on a motion rather than trial. Further Plaintiff is seeking advisory opinion from the Court as to how to further proceed with the action. No authority is cited for the proposition that the Court could or should provide such advice to one party to the action. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking service by publication, such request should be made to department 206. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERAN LI VS. ELBA GOUSSEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT ELBA GOUSSEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 547 UNION LLC VS. LYMAN K CHIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT LYMAN CHIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 290 DIVISION ST. LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. FRANCIS GILSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF 290 DIVISION ST. LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer re: waiver affirmative defense. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZITA, LLC VS. MITCHELL BOYD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Adn Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 13, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT MITCHELL BOYD, CHARLES BOYD, KEITH HONGO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Adn Complaint For Unlawful Detainer DENIED. Service properly accomplished by registered process servers. Moving party fails to provide sufficient evidence to rebut the presumption. Motion additionally fails to comply with CCP 1167.4. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiff failed to show compliance with CCP 128.5(f)(1)(A) and (B). = (501/REQ)
